tweets.text:
📊 AgentWorldBench: 7-domain benchmark with ground-truth observations from real environments, constructed from 5 frontier model trajectories on 9 established benchmarks.

Results: Qwen-AgentWorld-397B-A17B achieves the highest overall score (58.71), outperforming Claude Opus 4.8 (56.59), GPT-5.4 (58.25), and Gemini 3.1 Pro (54.57).

For Qwen-AgentWorld-35B-A3B, LWM training lifts Qwen3.5-35B-A3B by +8.66 points (47.73 → 56.39), surpassing Claude Sonnet 4.6 (56.04).

Part I: Building the Foundation Model for Environment Simulation

Faithful environment simulation requires multi-step causal reasoning, stateful tracking, and domain-specific knowledge. Frontier LLMs have some simulation ability from pretraining — but it's incidental, not an objective.

So we train from scratch: CPT injects environment knowledge → SFT activates next-state prediction as a thinking pattern → RL sharpens simulation fidelity with hybrid rewards.
